## the metric that doesn't fit on a spreadsheet

At one point, the AI asked me point blank: why are you asking this? what is it you're hoping to hear?

*The New Yorker.* is still the gold standard.
I also read *the New York Times* every morning.

We shipped 7 features in 3 days.
The well known pattern still shows up in real time systems.

I deserved my job — she had a publication.
Wait ... really?
The 2019-2020 period changed everything.

We bought apples, oranges and pears.
It's the product which shipped last week.
He said: yes we can.
She said "hi".
We have less people than before.

The start-up used e-mail for the sign-up flow.
Each company has their own onboarding.
The team's roadmap lost it's potential.

We worked on research & development and/or marketing.

By Dan & Lee
